name: Lyme Disease - Doxycycline Prescription Query
description: Tests ability to find Lyme disease patients via doxycycline. Doxycycline is heavily cross-indicated: acne, RMSF, chlamydia, atypical pneumonia, malaria prophylaxis.

prompts.broad: Find patients prescribed doxycycline — a tetracycline antibiotic used for Lyme disease, acne, Rocky Mountain spotted fever, chlamydia, atypical pneumonia, and malaria prophylaxis.
prompts.expert: Identify patients treated with doxycycline via their medication orders as a proxy for Lyme disease treatment. Search MedicationRequest resources for doxycycline coded in RxNorm. Be aware that doxycycline is one of the most heavily cross-indicated antibiotics in clinical practice — it is first-line for acne, chlamydia, atypical pneumonia, Rocky Mountain spotted fever, and malaria prophylaxis — so a doxycycline-only cohort will include a substantial proportion of non-Lyme patients.

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Patients on doxycycline. Heavy cross-indication with multiple infections.
